title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.255 - Exhibiting livestock, all qualified 4
text:
262.255.  Exhibiting livestock, all qualified 4-H and FFA members permitted to participate — rules and fees permitted. — The state fair commission shall permit all qualifying 4-H and Future Farmers of America (FFA) members to exhibit livestock at the state fair.  The state fair commission shall have the authority to establish rules and fees for participation in its individual events.
(L. 2012 S.B. 631)
